name: Chicken C/p
recipeIngredient: Chicken cut into parts (or 2 chicken breasts if you only like white meat)
Package of G-Washington chicken or beef bouillon (or other powdered bouillon)
recipeInstructions:
1. Put vegetables in crock pot.
2. Place chicken on top of the vegetables.
3. Sprinkle with bouillon and seasonings.
4. Add 1/4 cup water.
5. Cook on low for 8 hours. This is a delicious roasted chicken.
